negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing AsyncExec as a first-class transaction type/storage codec variant/network announcement metric. Searches found no AsyncExec, TxAsyncExec, or asyncexec support in the audited repos.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/storage/codecs/src/alloy/transaction/mod.rs enumerates Scheduled, AsyncCommitment, AsyncSettlement, and Passkey transaction codec modules, but no AsyncExec variant or codec module.
Existing custom transaction type support covers other Ritual transaction variants and does not provide a separate AsyncExec metrics bucket.

rationale: The AsyncExec candidates are adjacent custom-transaction typing work, not scheduled-specific, but they share the type/codec lineage and have direct evidence files.
statement: AsyncExec transactions are encoded/decoded as first-class storage-codec variants and are counted separately in announced transaction type metrics rather than folded into scheduled or other transaction buckets.
suggested_falsification_tests: Round-trip an AsyncExec transaction through the alloy storage codec and assert the decoded variant and fields are AsyncExec.
Feed announced transaction metrics a mix including AsyncExec and Scheduled transactions and assert AsyncExec increments only the AsyncExec counter/histogram.
summary: AsyncExec transaction typing, storage codec, and metrics support are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: AsyncExec codec round-trip and announcement metrics regression tests.
title: AsyncExec participates in transaction typing and metrics
